headline: Weber marks down grills and griddles to their best prices ever for July 4th
summary: Weber is holding a major sale on grills and griddles. Discounts are available ahead of the July 4th holiday. Find best-ever prices on various grilling accessories.

headline: The video game disc is dead
summary: The era of physical video game discs appears to be ending. Gamers traditionally accumulated many physical items, including disc games. This shift marks a significant change in gaming culture.

headline: Influencer screenings aren’t going away
summary: Reports of Universal halting influencer screenings for 'The Odyssey' were false. Influencers attended special showings alongside traditional media. Advanced influencer screenings remain a standard practice for studios.

headline: Godox’s feature-packed key light is down to its best price yet
summary: The Godox ES45 Desktop LED Key Light is currently on sale. It offers an affordable alternative to the Elgato Key Light. Features include adjustable brightness and color temperature, now priced at $119.

headline: The Coslus C20 Cordless Rechargeable Water Flosser Drops 83% to Just $6.99
summary: The Coslus C20 Cordless Rechargeable Water Flosser is heavily discounted. It's now available for only $6.99, an 83% price drop. This surprising deal promotes good oral hygiene, even for gamers.

headline: Walmart Has the Lowest Price on a GeForce RTX 5070 Prebuilt Gaming PC in 2026
summary: Walmart offers the lowest price on a GeForce RTX 5070 prebuilt gaming PC. The CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme includes the new 2026 Intel Arrow Lake Refresh CPU. This deal is positioned as a future-proof gaming rig.

headline: Today’s Top Deals: Invincible Omnibus, LEGO Botanicals, and Death Stranding 2 for PC
summary: IGN highlights top deals including the Invincible Omnibus and LEGO Botanicals. Pre-orders for Death Stranding 2 on PC are also featured. Other discounts include a Dreame bladeless fan and Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade.

headline: Get the Alienware Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming PC for $1,437 at Dell Outlet Before It Goes Out of Stock
summary: The Alienware Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming PC is available at Dell Outlet. Priced at $1,437, it's an excellent deal. This rig is ideal for high-performance 1080p and 1440p gaming.

headline: Married at First Sight UK star arrested on suspicion of rape
summary: A star from 'Married at First Sight UK' has been arrested. The arrest is on suspicion of rape. This follows a BBC Panorama investigation into the reality TV show.

headline: Boys who raped teen girls given custodial sentences
summary: Two teenage boys convicted of rape have received custodial sentences. They were initially given non-custodial sentences. The decision follows legal review of their initial sentencing.

headline: Pubs allowed to stay open until 5am for England Mexico match
summary: Pubs are granted extended hours until 5 am for the England vs. Mexico match. This reverses an earlier government decision against relaxing World Cup licensing laws. The move allows fans to watch the game during late-night hours.

headline: Labour failed to prepare for power, admits PM's former top aide
summary: Morgan McSweeney, former top aide, admits Labour failed to prepare for power. He states the party did not deliver quickly enough while in office. This admission comes in his first-ever BBC interview.
